metadata.falPrompt:
Small decorative portrait frame for a medieval RPG character 
portrait box. Interior opening approximately 80x80 pixels. 
Exterior frame ornate but restrained — aged and worn, 
not pristine.

Style: Somewhere between a painted medallion frame and a 
worn reliquary border. Could suggest hammered metal, 
dark carved wood, or aged gilt. 

Details: Subtle corner flourishes — simple knotwork or 
geometric medieval pattern. Slight asymmetry from age and 
wear. Tarnished gold or dark bronze tone with near-black 
shadow in the recesses. A thin inner lip before the 
portrait opening.

NOT: ornate fantasy filigree, glowing effects, 
modern clean lines, heraldic symbols, crosses or 
religious iconography baked in.

Color palette: tarnished dark gold, aged bronze, 
near-black shadow, faint warm highlight on raised edges.
Transparent background outside the frame.
Serious, melancholic, medieval Florentine aesthetic.
PNG format, transparent background., 16-bit pixel art, SNES-era detailed sprites, rich palette
